unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Staying Connected Online
drDigitalIntro:
Staying in touch is one of the best things a computer can do.
• Send messages, video call, and share photos.
• Be kind, and ask before sharing others' photos.
• Remember: anything you post online can be shared further.

playgroundTask.goal: You sent a message and made a video call

steps.say: Click on Sam to open their conversation.
Type a message: 'Hi Sam! How are you?' and send it.
React to Sam's message with an emoji.
Start a video call with Sam.

drDigitalSuccess: You sent a message to Sam and made a video call! Staying in touch is just a tap away.
drDigitalHint: Click on Sam, type your message, click Send, then react to their message and use the camera icon for a video call.
